description: VERIFIED LIVE: Mastodon (mastodon.social instance) via its public API — trending hashtags, trending posts/links, and search. No token needed for these endpoints. Tested live by Claude Code: trends/tags and v2/search both returned 200. (Your home timeline / posting would need an instance access token.)

tools.description: Currently trending hashtags on the instance. VERIFIED.

tools.description: Currently trending posts (statuses) on the instance.

tools.name: mastodon_trending_links
tools.description: Currently trending news links on the instance.

tools.description: Search accounts, hashtags and statuses. VERIFIED.
